reviews.text: Being able to take your dog inside, instead of having to secluded in an area usually outside with the smokers and vapers is a great touch.Meal typeBrunchPrice per person£10–20Food: 4Service: 5Atmosphere: 3Noise levelQuiet, easy to talkParking spacePlenty of parkingParking optionsFree parking lot
